The global financial markets ended the trading week in a state of absolute, massive hyper-anxiety. Airbus officially committed to the massive, multi-billion dollar development of the A3XX (which would later become the A380), a massive, double-deck superjumbo jet expressly designed to break Boeing's absolute monopoly on the highly lucrative 747 market. This massive corporate gamble was heavily predicated on the aggressive belief that future global air travel would rely entirely on massive, high-volume hub-to-hub routing.

The incredibly massive, deeply humiliating hostage crisis in southern India aggressively continued to paralyze the national security apparatus. ## SECTION 8 — This Day in History (World)
On November 3, 1957, the incredibly massive, absolutely historic, and profoundly poignant Soviet space mission Sputnik 2 was aggressively and successfully launched. It incredibly carried Laika, a small, stray Moscow dog, making her the absolute, very first living Earth creature to orbit the planet. The massive, deeply controversial mission heavily proved that living organisms could absolutely survive massive orbital launch, but Laika's tragic, massive death in orbit sparked aggressive, early debates regarding the massive ethics of using animals in highly dangerous aerospace testing.

On November 3, 1903, the incredibly massive, fiercely independent, and heavily consequential Republic of Panama was officially and aggressively declared independent from Colombia. The massive, heavily armed rebellion was fiercely and explicitly supported by the United States government under President Theodore Roosevelt. This massive geopolitical maneuver immediately allowed the US to aggressively secure the absolute, sovereign rights to heavily construct the incredibly massive, globally vital Panama Canal, cementing absolute American dominance over trans-oceanic naval and commercial transit.

## SECTION 9 — This Day in History (India)
On November 3, 1933, Amartya Sen, the incredibly massive, absolutely brilliant, and globally revered Indian economist and philosopher, was officially born in Santiniketan, Bengal. He achieved absolute, historical immortality by heavily winning the Nobel Memorial Prize in Economic Sciences in 1998. His incredibly massive, fundamentally groundbreaking research heavily focused on welfare economics, social choice theory, and the absolute causes of devastating famines, aggressively and profoundly redefining the massive global understanding of how deeply impoverished populations are economically marginalized.

On November 3, 1992, Prem Nath, the incredibly massive, universally adored, and fiercely versatile actor and director of Hindi cinema, officially passed away in Bombay (Mumbai). He achieved absolute, historical cinematic immortality by aggressively delivering incredibly massive, highly energetic performances in iconic Bollywood blockbusters like *Aan*, *Teesri Manzil*, and *Bobby*. His massive, absolutely undeniable screen presence and incredible ability to flawlessly transition between massive heroic and villainous roles heavily cemented his massive, immortal legacy in the golden age of Indian cinema.
